overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Star Wars Jedi: Survivor showing protagonist Cal Kestis walking along a metal platform on the planet Koboh. The character passes a crashed starship wreck and stops to overlook a canyon with a waterfall, showcasing high-fidelity sci-fi industrial environments mixed with natural rocky landscapes.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metal walkway with mountain vista

events.description: a yellow speeder bike flies past from right to left in the background

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the metal platform with BD-1 droid following behind

notable_agents.action: speeder bike flying horizontally across the background from right to left

entered.detail: rusted metal grating surface with drainage channels
tubular metal barrier running along the platform edge
jagged peaks with sparse vegetation under partly cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open metal platform with expansive views of distant rocky mountains. A yellow speeder bike suddenly flies past in the background from right to left, adding motion to the otherwise serene sci-fi landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: walkway alongside massive crashed starship wreckage

agents.ego_description: continuing along the platform passing industrial structures built into the cliffside

entered.detail: massive overturned hull with red accents embedded in the rock face
cylindrical metal structure with antenna arrays
steep canyon walls with orange-red stone formations

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside an enormous crashed starship wreck that dominates the left side of the frame, casting shadows over the walkway. Industrial towers and red rock cliffs frame the path as the character moves deeper into the industrial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon overlook with waterfall and wreckage below

events.description: character stops walking and looks over the railing at the canyon waterfall below
character resumes walking along the platform away from the overlook

agents.ego_description: stops at the railing to look down at the waterfall and wreckage in the canyon, then continues walking

entered.detail: misty waterfall cascading down the rock face into the canyon below
scattered metal debris and destroyed structures at the canyon bottom
white mist rising from geothermal vents in the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the platform edge to observe a dramatic canyon vista featuring a waterfall and scattered wreckage below. Steam rises from the canyon floor as the character looks down, then turns to continue walking along the path with the massive ship wreck now receding into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an industrial metal platform that transitions from an open mountain vista to the shadow of a massive starship wreck. It begins with the character walking through a serene landscape of distant rocky mountains as a yellow speeder bike streaks across the background. As the path progresses, the scene shifts toward a towering crashed starship that dominates the left side of the frame, casting deep shadows over the walkway amidst industrial towers and red rock cliffs. The camera then reaches the platform's edge, pausing to overlook a dramatic canyon filled with rising steam, scattered wreckage, and a waterfall. Finally, the character turns away from the vista to continue along the path, leaving the massive wreck to recede into the distance.
